description: Price of the fz-rh2.16.x oracle-restoration scaffolding: src/modules/runtime_library/legacy/ (frozen pre-18.5 kernel.fz + runtime.fz), the legacy_source field on RuntimeModuleSource, legacy_prelude_source(), and the four #[ignore]d old-world stragglers all exist ONLY to keep the old pipeline runnable as the migration oracle. When fz-rh2.16.6 deletes the old compiler, delete all of it in the same arc — nothing in compiler2 may ever read a legacy source.
title: Delete the legacy runtime-library snapshot with the old pipeline
